meta.description: View on %s, an alternative private front-end to Reddit.
banner.offline: You are viewing a local offline backup. Live data is currently unavailable.
modal.leave_title: You are about to leave this site
search.placeholder: Search · try sub:linux · r:sfw · u>100 · type:video
search.hint: Constraints: sub:a+b (only these) · sub:-a-b (exclude) · r:nsfw · u>100 · c>10 · a:user · t:video|gif|image · after:YYYY-MM-DD
listing.all_nsfw: All posts are hidden because they are NSFW. Enable "Show NSFW posts" in settings to view.
listing.all_filtered: (All content on this page has been filtered)
listing.miss_hint: No posts here matched your filters — keep loading to search further back.
post.no_tokens_alert: No session tokens available on this instance
loadmore.label: Load More
loadmore.quota: Quota temporarily unavailable — try again later.
empty.no_posts_month: Try searching for something? No posts this month.
empty.reddit_blocked: Oops... Reddit blocked us. So, reddit, fuck you!
archive.no_posts: No archived posts for this subreddit.
archive.nsfw_body: There are posts here, but they are all hidden by your NSFW filter.
archive.nsfw_hint_post: and enable "Show NSFW posts" to view them.
archive_hub.empty_min: No archived subreddits with more than %v posts yet.
archive_hub.dead_tag: · Banned on Reddit (local archive still readable)
archive_hub.dead_title: Banned on Reddit (local archive still readable)
archive_search.placeholder: Search posts, or type a subreddit to filter
archive_search.no_results: No archived posts match your search.
settings.lazy_media_title: When on, images and videos in online post listings are only requested once the post scrolls near the viewport, instead of all at once.
settings.video_quality_title: Preferred maximum resolution for Reddit-hosted (v.redd.it) videos. Reddit serves each video as a fixed ladder of renditions; this picks the highest rendition at or below the chosen height. Source keeps the original (best) quality. A height above the source's own maximum is ignored.
settings.mute_all_videos_title: Start every video muted. You can still unmute with the player's own controls.
settings.mute_nsfw_videos_title: Start videos on NSFW posts muted. Ignored when "Mute all videos" is on.
settings.disable_visit_confirm: Do not confirm before visiting content on Reddit
settings.fetch_sub_about: Fetch sub about info on visit
settings.fetch_sub_about_title: When off (default), visiting a subreddit page does not actively request the sub's about info upstream; only cached data is used. The background icon/about prefetch is unaffected.
settings.filter_placeholder: Homepage query, e.g. sub:cats+dogs-meta u>100 t:image
settings.disable_upstream_title: When on, every user action that would spend session token quota is served from the local archive only — no active query is sent upstream. CDN media requests still flow (subject to the global rate limit). Use this on public deployments to keep your IP from being blacklisted by sudden bursts of upstream traffic.
settings.token_ttl_title: How long a successful TOTP unlock keeps /settings open before it re-prompts. The cookie is HttpOnly, single-IP, and not extended on activity — a longer window trades shorter re-auth friction for a longer attack surface if the device is stolen. Capped at 60 minutes.
settings.confirm_continue: Are you sure you want to continue?
settings.np_modal_body: Enabling this may cause your request quota to deplete rapidly. Make sure you know what you are doing.
settings.debug_modal_body: Enabling this on a public network may expose instance diagnostics and private information.
settings.upstream_warn: Warning: initiative upstream access is enabled. On a public deployment this may rapidly exhaust your Reddit session-token quota and get your IP blacklisted upstream.
settings.upstream_modal_body: Turning this protection off lets user actions reach Reddit directly. On a public deployment, sudden bursts of upstream traffic can exhaust your session-token quota in minutes and cause Reddit to blacklist this instance's IP.
error.title: Error: %s
error.event_log: Prefetch Event Log (%v entries, newest first)
fr.upstream_disabled: Initiative upstream access is disabled by the operator: only locally archived content is served. CDN media still flows under the global rate limit.
fr.quota_exhausted: Reddit OAuth quota fully exhausted: too many upstream requests within the past 10 minutes.
fr.hr_l1: HR rate limit L1 triggered: too many upstream requests within the past 5 seconds.
fr.hr_l2: HR rate limit L2 triggered: too many upstream requests within the past 30 seconds.
fr.hr_l3: HR rate limit L3 triggered: too many upstream requests within the past 5 minutes.
fr.hr_redis_down: HR rate-limit store (Redis) is unreachable: blocking upstream traffic and retrying with backoff until it recovers.
fr.totp_replay: Warning — your TOTP secret may have been compromised. You are the second person to submit this correct code within the same 30-second window. The token was NOT issued. Rotate the secret immediately (redmemo --reset-totp).
fr.auth_locked: Three wrong TOTP codes — this round is locked until the next 30-second window. Wait for your authenticator to roll over and try again.
fr.unsafe_env: You declined to confirm the environment is safe. The /settings gate will not proceed until you re-enter from a trusted screen.
fr.congrats: Congrats — Reddit hasn't sanctioned you yet… or has it?
